user.title: Heating Power Flow
user.description: Create a virtual energy flow sensor from existing flow and temperature sensors.

data_description.name: Name for this energy flow monitor
data_description.config_type: Standard: one flow + supply/return temperature. Dual-Line: two lines with shared return temperature.
data_description.mode: Source: produces thermal energy (e.g. heat pump, boiler). Sink: consumes thermal energy (e.g. radiator circuit, floor heating, hot water).
data_description.medium: Heat transfer fluid in the circuit. Choose 'Custom' to enter specific heat capacity and density manually.

medium_custom.title: Custom Medium Properties
medium_custom.description: Enter the material constants for the heat transfer fluid.

data_description.specific_heat: Specific heat capacity of the fluid in kJ/(kg·K). Water: 4.186, typical glycol mixtures: 3.2–3.9.
data_description.density: Density of the fluid in kg/L. Water: 1.0, typical glycol mixtures: 1.02–1.06.

standard.title: Standard Triplet Configuration
standard.description: Select the flow sensor and temperature sensors for the supply and return lines.

data_description.flow_sensor: Sensor measuring the volumetric flow rate (e.g. L/min, m³/h)
data_description.supply_temp: Temperature sensor on the supply line
data_description.return_temp: Temperature sensor on the return line
data_description.pump_entity: Entity indicating whether the circulation pump is running (e.g. binary_sensor, switch). Leave empty to disable pump gating.
data_description.pump_delay: Seconds to wait after pump turns on before values are considered valid.
data_description.ema_samples: Number of samples for Exponential Moving Average smoothing on input sensors. 1 = no smoothing (raw values), higher values = stronger smoothing. Recommended: 3–10.

dual_line.title: Dual-Line Configuration
dual_line.description: Select the flow and temperature sensors for both lines and the shared return temperature.

data_description.supply_temp_a: Temperature sensor on supply line A
data_description.flow_sensor_a: Flow rate sensor for line A (e.g. L/min, m³/h)
data_description.supply_temp_b: Temperature sensor on supply line B
data_description.flow_sensor_b: Flow rate sensor for line B (e.g. L/min, m³/h)
data_description.pump_entity: Entity indicating whether the circulation pump is running (e.g. binary_sensor, switch). Leave empty to disable pump gating.
data_description.pump_delay: Seconds to wait after pump turns on before values are considered valid.
data_description.ema_samples: Number of samples for Exponential Moving Average smoothing on input sensors. 1 = no smoothing (raw values), higher values = stronger smoothing. Recommended: 3–10.

data_description.mode: Source: produces thermal energy. Sink: consumes thermal energy.
data_description.medium: Heat transfer fluid in the circuit. Choose 'Custom' to enter specific heat capacity and density manually.

data_description.specific_heat: Specific heat capacity of the fluid in kJ/(kg·K).
data_description.density: Density of the fluid in kg/L.

data_description.ema_samples: Number of samples for Exponential Moving Average smoothing on input sensors. 1 = no smoothing (raw values), higher values = stronger smoothing. Recommended: 3–10.
Number of samples for Exponential Moving Average smoothing on input sensors. 1 = no smoothing (raw values), higher values = stronger smoothing. Recommended: 3–10.
